title: French Chicken Wrap
description: A French-inspired chicken wrap with crispy chicken and crunchy vegetables. Serve immediately for a delightful snack or light meal.
instructions: Season chicken breast with salt and pepper. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook crispy bacon in a pan over medium heat until crispy. Set aside.
Brush wrap with olive oil and toast in the oven for 2-3 minutes or until lightly browned.
Assemble the wrap by spreading Dutch mustard on the bottom half, followed by cooked chicken, crispy bacon, lettuce, tomato, and cheese.
Fold the wrap in half to enclose the filling.
Cut in half and serve immediately.
